data.title: Amphenol CEO Credits 26% Sales Boost To IT, Mobile Networks, Acquisitions: 'We Again Realized Strong Profitability'
data.description: Amphenol expects fiscal 2024 sales of $14.85 billion-$14.95 billion, representing an 18%-19% increase over the prior year.

data.title: Texas Instruments Posts Strong Q3 Results, Joins Valmont Industries, Lithia Motors, Teledyne Technologies And Other Big Stocks Moving Higher On Wednesday
'We're Happy Governor Newsom Banned Hemp': Why One Cannabis CEO Supports The Move
data.description: California's cannabis industry is thriving, according to Gold Flora CEO Laurie Holcomb. Despite challenges, the state leads in revenue and innovation.

data.title: Decoding Eli Lilly's Options Activity: What's the Big Picture?
Boston Scientific Q3 Earnings: Revenue And EPS Beat, Lifts Annual Forecast On Strong Demand For Heart Devices
data.description: Boston Scientific exceeded Q3 expectations with $4.21 billion revenue and $0.63 EPS. Cardiovascular sales rose 25%, and 2024 growth guidance was updated.
